I try to compile this, I get an error that says "expected unqualified-id" on the line with the switch statement. What is the problem here?

The error message "expected unqualified-id" usually indicates a syntax error in the code. In your case, the issue is likely due to the line that says "//using enum Operation;". This line is not valid C++ syntax. The correct way to use an enum in a switch statement is to either qualify the enum values with the enum name or to use a using declaration.
